message:
ci: add audit.toml to ignore unfixable rsa vulnerability

The rsa crate has RUSTSEC-2023-0071 (Marvin Attack) with no fix available.
This comes from the ssh-key -> russh -> wish dependency chain.

Also ignore unmaintained crate warnings which aren't security issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# Security audit configuration
+# See: https://github.com/rustsec/rustsec/blob/main/cargo-audit/audit.toml.example
+
+[advisories]
+# Ignore advisories that have no fix available
+ignore = [
+    # rsa: Marvin Attack potential key recovery through timing sidechannels
+    # No fixed upgrade available - comes from ssh-key -> russh -> wish dependency
+    "RUSTSEC-2023-0071",
+]
+
+# Also ignore unmaintained crate warnings (not security vulnerabilities)
+informational_warnings = ["unmaintained"]
